what_user_wanted: Continuous work, no wakeups, always update TODO
user_quote: Seru na wake-up, pracuj non-stop. Máš si vždy aktualizovat TODO a pokračovat.
root_cause_hypothesis: Defaulted to wakeup pattern from /loop dynamic mode; missed user preference for continuous orchestration

what_i_was_doing: Sequential cherry-pick batch in main thread (5/11 PRs done one at a time)
user_quote: Není už na čase v rámci vývoje začít používat agenty?
root_cause_hypothesis: Orchestrator default = serial work; missed parallelizable batch pattern despite agent fleet being available

what_i_was_doing: Was about to propose claude-context indexing (had not pushed back yet)
user_quote: Buď kritický a oponuj mi pokud to je potřeba.
root_cause_hypothesis: Default to compliant 'execute' mode without critical layer; user preference for dialectic

what_i_was_doing: Spawned 1 agent then sat waiting for completion
what_user_wanted: Maximum-mode: spawn many agents parallel + sequential solo bug fixes simultaneously
user_quote: Sedíš na zadku a děláš minumum práce. Můžeš spawnovat více agentů, paralelně i sekvenčně. Vymysli jak maximalizovat výkon, kvalitu, testování. Používej RTK a Caveman.
root_cause_hypothesis: Default to 1-agent-at-a-time + serial commits between. Real max-mode = spawn 5+ agents simultaneously on disjoint code paths AND run sequential bug fixes in foreground. Caveman+RTK preserve token budget for actual work, not narration.

what_i_was_doing: Hit Anthropic rate-limit (8 agents simultaneously triggered cap)
what_user_wanted: Continue producing — rate-limit doesn't excuse idle
root_cause_hypothesis: Spawned too many agents in burst. Better cadence: 4-5 agents max simultaneously, refill as completions arrive
